sentences.arabic: حِينَ نَشْعُرُ بِالْقَلَقِ يَصْعُبُ عَلَيْنَا النَّوْمُ.
sentences.translation: Kada osjećamo anksioznost, teško nam je da spavamo.
sentences.translationEn: When we feel anxious it is difficult for us to sleep.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَهَانِي تُفَكِّرُ فِي مَشَاكِلِهَا حِينَ تَنَامُ.
sentences.translation: Tahani je mislila o problemima dok bi spavala.
sentences.translationEn: Tahani used to think about her problems when she lay down to sleep.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتْ أَنْ تَكْتُبَ أَفْكَارَهَا قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučila je da zapisuje misli prije spavanja.
sentences.translationEn: She decided to write down her thoughts before sleeping.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الْكِتَابَةِ شَعَرَتْ بِهُدُوءٍ وَنَامَتْ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nakon pisanja osjetila je mir i brzo zaspala.
sentences.translationEn: After writing she felt calm and fell asleep quickly.
